_format.note: Voice-style placeholder prose for the dossier and battle log. Inline markup: ~~strike~~ for double-strike, [[N]] for an N-char redaction bar, **gold** for the gold accent. All prose is lowercase.
_format.lookup: Dossier reads: subtitles[species] || subtitles[type]; notes[species] || notes[type]. Battle log reads: actions[abilityKey].use || actionDefaults[element].use; same for hit/flavor. effectDefaults[kind] is consulted when an ability has no damage. afflictions[statusKey].apply / .tick are read on apply / per-turn-tick.
_format.templates: {actor} = lowercased name of the doer. {target} = lowercased name of the receiver. {name} = ability display name (lowercased). {status} = lowercased affliction name.

subtitles.fire: something is wrong with its heat.
subtitles.water: it is dry to the touch. it should not be.
subtitles.grass: it has been waiting longer than i have.
subtitles.light: it does not warm what it lights.
subtitles.Emberkin: i have been carrying it. i did not know.
subtitles.Cinderling: no fuel observed. the heat continues.
subtitles.Magmaw: when it opens i hear another room.
subtitles.Charnel: i do not look at it for long.
subtitles.Rivergeist: subject does not remain at site of filing.
subtitles.Brineback: it has been here too long.
subtitles.Mireling: i found it where i had left no print.
subtitles.Loamback: i mistook it for a stone. then for ~~moss~~ a face.
subtitles.Sproutkin: it is small. it is opening.
subtitles.Mosshorn: it was a stone for a long time.
subtitles.Vinewyrm: it is crossing the room. slowly.
subtitles.Bloomback: it is in flower. the flowers face me.
subtitles.Lumenpup: it does not cast a shadow.
subtitles.Dawnstag: it knows when the dawn was.
subtitles.Halowyrm: the light it carries hurts. i look anyway.
subtitles.Glimmerfox: i never saw it begin to move.
subtitles.Voidling: there is a place where it should be.
subtitles.Umbragale: the wind is wrong in this room.

fire: it ~~burns~~ smolders where i did not light it.
i feel its heat after it has gone.
it does not warm me. it warms what i was.
water: i hear ~~water~~ something running near it.
grass: where i did not plant, it grows.
it is older than the ground it stands on.
light: it is too ~~bright~~ clear to look at directly.
the light it makes is not clean.
i can still see it when i ~~close~~ shut my eyes.
dark: it has been here longer than i thought.
it does not require my eyes to see me.
Emberkin: i found it in my coat. the lining is soaked.
it ~~hums~~ does not hum, but the floor next to it does.
Ashmaw: i feed it the small things. it accepts them.
it watches the page while i write. it watches the smaller words first.
i think it is **patient** with me.
Cinderling: specimen lit at field site, brought through containment door.
no fuel ~~observed~~ permitted. the spark persists.
specimen does not require ~~feeding~~ attention. specimen ~~has not~~ has not.
Pyrelord: this room has always been its room.
the heat that has lived here is its heat.
i do not interrupt it. no one has.
Magmaw: it opens once a day. less, lately.
what is inside it is not it. what is inside it is ~~bigger~~ farther.
the air from inside smells of [[8]].
Soothlick: it cleans the wounds first. it cleans the smaller things inside them after.
i forget the hour after it has gone.
Charnel: the floor does not blacken. it is already.
i do not write what it ~~eats~~ takes.
Tidewhelp: it follows streams that are not in this building.
i drink water and it watches.
i am beginning to drink the way it drinks. my throat is fine.
Rivergeist: i hear the building's water in the wrong direction.
Brineback: the floor under it is white now.
the brine does not leave it. the room does not leave it.
i was the second one to be assigned to it.
Mireling: i found it under what i had not lifted.
the mud where it sleeps does not dry.
i do not know what it is small for.
Coralhusk: phase two: what remains has edges.
i used my hand the once. the hand has [[5]].
Frostfin: i do not remember catching it. i do not remember catching it.
the room is colder where it sits.
i think it has been the same one. all of them.
Deepmaw: when i look at it, i look at something further down.
Loamback: it grows ~~quietly~~ patiently even when held.
the ground misses it when it leaves the room.
when i set it down, the floor under it is darker.
Sproutkin: it is opening. that is what it is doing.
i do not know what is inside.
Mosshorn: the place it sat is colder than the rest of the floor.
i can hear it shifting at night. once a night.
no one has measured how long it was a stone for.
Vinewyrm: i write while it moves. the page ~~tightens~~ holds.
i was sitting near the door. i am sitting near the wall now. i did not move.
it knows where my chair is.
Bloomback: the flowers do not turn with the light. they turn with my chair.
i ~~picked~~ took one. the rest noticed.
the smell is **sweet**. that is the worst part.
Thornling: it does not mean to. i think.
i can feel where it touched, three days later.
Hollowoak: i can hear something inside it. there is nothing inside it.
it has been here longer than the others. all of the others.
it does not move. that is its **work**.
Lumenpup: it makes shadows on me. it does not cast its own.
it is warm. it should be warmer.
i cannot picture it when i ~~close my eyes~~ try to.
Aurabeast: the room is brighter where it has stood.
it does not eat. it has been here [[10]].
i think it has been **writing me down**.
Dawnstag: i have not seen the morning since it arrived.
i cannot tell if its antlers are growing. each time i look they are different.
it does not sleep. it does not need to.
Halowyrm: it is longer than the room. i have ~~measured~~ counted.
looking at it hurts. i look anyway.
when it speaks i do not ~~hear~~ remember it.
Glimmerfox: it is faster than i am.
i am not certain it was ever here.
i write its name and i think of someone ~~else~~ who is not.
Shadowmaw: it stays low to the floor.
it has been listening for a long time.
i think it is waiting for me to ~~speak~~ say its name. i ~~have~~ have not.
Voidling: i can see what is behind it. it is not behind it.
it does not occupy a volume. the volume is occupied around it.
i mark its **name** on the page so i remember it remains.
Nightcreep: it is closer than it was.
i did not see it move. nothing did.
i should ~~not~~ keep writing this down.
Wraithfin: it ~~is~~ has been here a moment longer than i have looked.
i can see through it where i would prefer not to.
it does not breathe. it does not need to. ~~no~~
Umbragale: the wind in this room has been wrong since it arrived.
i can hear another room when it is near. another.
the page lifts when ~~i~~ it has not.

passives.brutal: it does not measure how hard.
passives.thick_hide: it arrives heavier than it left.
passives.tide_guard: the water answers when it asks.
passives.iron_grip: once it has hold of a thing.
passives.tide_blessed: the salt does not leave it.
passives.verdant_soul: green does not heal it. it heals green.
passives.sunforged: hammered out of a brighter place.
passives.shadowforged: hammered out of where light is not.
passives.tempo: keeps a meter i cannot follow.
passives.lightbearer: walks ahead of its own glow.
passives.soul_drain: takes a small piece each strike.
passives.vampire_touch: every hit is a small drink.
passives.second_wind: stands once after it has fallen.
passives.warm_blood: resists the cold that comes after.
passives.iron_will: does not bend where others would.
passives.hex_eater: swallows what is laid upon it.
passives.frostbite: cold spreads from where it touches.
passives.patient_hunter: waits longer than it needs to.
passives.echo_form: repeats the last sound i made.
passives.dreadful: i do not want to look at it.
passives.lucky: the dice do not catch it.
passives.savage: does not stop at the kill.

events.swap_in: {actor} steps forward to take its place.
events.swap_none: {actor} ~~tries~~ has no one to swap to.
events.swap_curse: the name takes from {actor} on the way out.
